name: Lamb and Pine Nut Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Bok Choy Cut Into 1-inch Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together water, oyster sauce, cornstarch, grated gingerroot, and chicken bouillon granules in a 1-cup measure. Microwave uncovered on 100% power for 1½ minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
2. In a small nonmetal bowl, combine bok choy, sliced mushrooms, and 1 tablespoon water. Cover with vented clear plastic wrap. Microwave covered on 100% power for 1½ minutes or until bok choy is just crisp-tender. Drain.
3. Preheat the microwave browning dish on 100% power for 3 minutes.
4. Add cooking oil to the preheated dish and swirl to coat. Add lamb strips and cook covered on 100% power for 1-2 minutes or until done, draining fat.
5. Stir in the oyster sauce mixture. Microwave uncovered on 100% power for about 30 seconds or until heated through.
6. Toss the lamb mixture with toasted pine nuts and bok choy mixture. Serve over hot cooked rice if desired.
